pageHeader.title: Website Pricing
pageHeader.subtitle: Three clear options: a one-time starter build, reliable hosting with monthly reports, or ongoing growth work designed to improve lead generation and customer engagement.

hero.subtitle: Choose a one-time website, add hosting and insights, or invest in ongoing optimization with conversion-focused improvements — no jargon, no surprise fees on what's listed here.

packages.name: Starter Website
packages.tagline: Perfect for businesses that need a clean, professional online presence without ongoing commitments.

includes.text: You fully own the website after launch

packages.name: Hosting & Reports
packages.tagline: For businesses that want reliable hosting and simple monthly insights.

packages.name: Growth & Optimization
packages.tagline: Ongoing SEO optimization, Google Search Console reporting, and conversion-focused updates designed to improve visibility and generate more qualified leads over time (results vary by market and offer).

growthStory.title: Built for effortless growth
growthStory.body: Our process removes the complexity of launching and maintaining a digital presence. We focus on technical excellence so you can focus on your business goals.

image.alt: Modern workspace and digital growth — effortless web presence

items.title: FAST LAUNCH
items.body: Modern stacks and lean handoffs so your site ships on time and stays easy to extend.

items.title: SECURITY FIRST
items.body: SSL, sensible defaults, and maintenance options that keep your site and visitors safer.

items.title: CLEAN CODEBASE
items.body: Readable structure and docs so the next developer — or you — never hits a wall.

addOns.title: Add-on Services
addOns.subtitle: Need more than the starter scope? Layer on pages, integrations, or hourly support.

consultCta.title: Need Something Custom?
consultCta.body: Every business is different. If you need booking systems, e-commerce, advanced SEO, custom integrations, or additional pages, we can build a custom solution tailored to your goals.
